title: Electricity Balance Non-Validated (Discontinued, please read description) (Energinet)
description:
[Publisher: Energinet] This dataset is replaced by the new dataset [Generation per Production Type and Exchange](https://www.energidataservice.dk/tso-electricity/GenerationProdTypeExchange) and has been discontinued on January 6, 2026. It will be deleted at a later date. Updates will be published on this page and on [NEWS](https://www.energidataservice.dk/news).
Data represents the overall balance of consumption, production, import and export of electricity in an area. Production is divided into main production types.

Note that data is expressed in MWh/h, or average load, not MWh.

Data are based on upscaled real-time power measurements from the SCADA system. More precisely, the values are averages of power measurements every 4th second. **Errors will occur, and will generally not be corrected**. For statistical purposes, see [Production and Consumption - Settlement](https://www.energidataservice.dk/tso-electricity/ProductionConsumptionSettlement).

Gross consumption = sum of production + sum of exchange to connected areas. A positive exchange is import of electricity, while a negative is export. 

The total production is the sum of all production types.
